LLM Curve Similarity Report

Each matrix cell contains the numeric distance and is filled with a strong green→yellow→red gradient (green = similar, red = dissimilar). Lower distance means more similar. Color scale is consistent across the 4 views within each method. PCM/Area/Curve-Length are 2D-only in this library, so 3D entries are N/A.

1) Scalar summary (ndna_scalar)

Models are grouped by family, then sorted by ndna_scalar within each family.
